hypothesis: Incorporating an uncertainty-aware confidence estimate from Thermo-Calc into the DPO reward signal—specifically by down-weighting preference pairs where the thermodynamic simulation operates in compositional regions with sparse empirical database coverage—will reduce reward hacking and out-of-distribution drift in architecturally sensitive models like OLMo, resulting in more consistent improvement across all three model families compared to the uniform reward weighting used in the current framework.
